\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID6122 introduces Underspecified Equation (Pending Review) as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$((x^2 + y^2)^2 = a^2(x^2 - y^2))$
\]
